user_query: I want to surprise my family with personalized horoscope readings based on their zodiac signs and recommend a music radio station.

TaskList.description: Collect the zodiac signs of each family member.
Query horoscope information for the upcoming month based on the collected zodiac signs.
Compile personalized horoscope readings for each family member.
Identify the favorite music genres of each family member.
Recommend a radio station that plays a mix of the identified favorite music genres.
